title: Mentor Guide — Day 14 — AIA as Your Business Platform
coachingObjective: Ensure platform choice precedes compensation — entrepreneur framing throughout.

timing.preSession: Review platform pillars and economic engine sequence
timing.duringSession: Listen for employer vs platform language

discussionQuestions: Can they articulate why they chose AIA without mentioning pay first?
Which platform pillar matters most to their venture?
coachingTips: Connect pay to FEC Financial Engine
